summary: Senior software developer with 12+ years of professional experience building and shipping production web applications. Specialises in Ruby on Rails backend development — API design, database optimisation, and scalable service architecture — with hands-on frontend experience in React and Next.js. Has worked across e-commerce, fintech, and SaaS domains, consistently taking end-to-end ownership of features from schema design through to deployment. Has a foundational background in machine learning from academic research, including an MSc thesis on NLP and a BSc project on OCR for Devnagari script. Currently expanding knowledge in Generative AI, RAG, and Agentic AI with the goal of transitioning into AI engineering roles. Comfortable in agile teams, remote environments, and codebases that demand both clean code and high performance.
core_competencies: Generative AI, RAG and Agentic AI (active learning)
Daily AI tooling — Claude, Codex, Gemini

faq.question: What is Manish's primary programming language and framework?
faq.answer: Ruby on Rails. Manish has been specialising in Rails for approximately 6 years and has 12+ years of total professional experience.

faq.question: What database does Manish work with?
faq.answer: PostgreSQL is his primary database, with deep experience in query optimisation, index tuning, and EXPLAIN-driven analysis. He also has experience with MySQL and Redis.

faq.question: Does Manish have frontend experience?
faq.answer: Yes. He has hands-on experience with React, Next.js, and TypeScript, and has built responsive frontends as part of full-stack roles.

faq.question: What is Manish's experience with background jobs?
faq.answer: Manish has built and maintained Sidekiq-based background job infrastructure for async processing, large CSV imports, and third-party data sync.

faq.question: Has Manish worked in fintech or crypto?
faq.answer: Yes. He worked as a Senior Software Engineer at ZenLedger (crypto tax SaaS), where he built high-throughput blockchain transaction ingestion pipelines and automated report generation.

faq.question: Where is Manish located?
faq.answer: Kathmandu, Nepal (GMT+5:45). He is experienced in remote work and async collaboration with US-based teams.

faq.question: What is Manish's educational background?
faq.answer: He holds an MSc in Computer Science from Nepal College of Information Technology (2019) and a BSc in Computer Science & IT from Kathford International College (2013).

faq.question: Does Manish have experience with mobile apps?
faq.answer: He has designed REST APIs consumed by mobile clients. His primary mobile-facing experience is API design for mobile consumers rather than native mobile development. He has vibe-coded few small mobile apps for personal use using react native.

faq.question: Does Manish have experience with AI or machine learning?
faq.answer: Yes, with important context. He has formal academic ML experience: his MSc thesis implemented a Part of Speech Tagger for Nepali language using Python and scikit-learn, and his BSc project was an OCR system for Devnagari script. He does not have professional/commercial AI experience. He actively uses AI tools (Claude, Codex, Gemini) in daily work and is currently expanding his knowledge in Generative AI, RAG, and Agentic AI.

faq.question: Is Manish interested in AI engineering roles?
faq.answer: Yes. He is actively learning Generative AI, RAG, and Agentic AI and is planning to explore AI engineer roles that combine his strong backend engineering background with these emerging skills.

faq.question: What AI tools does Manish use?
faq.answer: He uses Claude (Anthropic), Codex (OpenAI), and Gemini (Google) regularly for programming assistance and day-to-day productivity.

faq.question: What was Manish's MSc thesis about?
faq.answer: Part of Speech Tagging for Nepali Language — a machine learning-based NLP project using Python and scikit-learn, focusing on a low-resource language.

faq.question: What was Manish's BSc final project?
faq.answer: An OCR (Optical Character Recognition) system for Devnagari script, covering image preprocessing, character segmentation, and classification.

faq.question: What is Manish currently learning?
faq.answer: Generative AI concepts, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), and Agentic AI — with the goal of expanding into AI engineering roles.

faq.question: What cloud and DevOps tools has Manish used?
faq.answer: He has experience with AWS, GCP, Docker, CI/CD pipelines, Git, and Heroku.

faq.question: What domains has Manish worked in?
faq.answer: Fintech (crypto tax at ZenLedger), SaaS/multi-tenant platforms (Fluid Tech), and e-commerce (Proshore Nepal, EB Pearls).
